creator: malus.x@gmail.com
text:
When running 6-STABLE, the two SATA drives attached to my Asus A8V-MX
motherboard functioned properly when the controller was set to either
SATA or AHCI mode. However, after upgrading to a recent 7.0-CURRENT
(around March 25th), the drives ceased to be detected by the motherboard,
regardless of the mode the controller is set to. More recent versions of
7.0-CURRENT have not rectified the issue. Furthermore, detaching and
reattaching the controllers with atacontrol does not cause the detection
of the drives.

I have attached both a verbose dmesg and the output of pciconf -lv. I do
not see any obvious problems, but I think the regression has something to
do with either the bus_dma or ACPI changes that went in during March.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Upgrade to a recent 7.0-CURRENT and boot the machine.
